description: A vertical OSHA winter safety graphic over a photograph. The photo shows two white plow trucks with orange front plow blades on a snow-covered, tree-lined road during snowfall, headlights on, surrounded by snow-laden bare trees under an overcast sky. In the upper-left is the blue 'OSHA' logo. The lower portion fades to a dark navy gradient and carries large bold white italic serif text 'WINTER SAFETY' flanked by dashes, with the URL 'OSHA.GOV/WINTER-WEATHER' beneath in white caps. The palette is blue and white.
